name: Greek Yogurt Pizza
description: Get some yogurt in a tasty manner
steps: Preheat oven to 450F and line pan with parchment paper
Mix together flour, baking powder, salt, oregano and greek yogurt until dough forms
Knead the dough until fully combined, then roll out as thin as possible, rolling the edges for the crust.
Lightly put a bit of pizza sauce and bake the crust for 12 minutes
Then add the remaining sauce, cover with cheese and toppings
Bake for 6-8 minutes, broil on high for 1 minute, then slice
